menuPage.label: Order now
menuPage.title: Our menu
menuPage.description: Naturally leavened pizzas, fresh ingredients and hot delivery. Filter and find your favorite.

hero.title: Authentic Italian pizza, at your home
hero.description: Slow-risen dough, wood-fired oven and hot delivery in 30 minutes. Order in a few taps.

about.label: About us
about.title: Since 2010, the Neapolitan tradition
about.description: We started as a small neighborhood pizzeria with a simple idea: bring pizza to the table the way it's made in Naples. No shortcuts, just selected raw ingredients and a lot of passion.
about.point1Text: Baked at 450°C in 90 seconds, for a light, airy crust.
about.point2Text: San Marzano tomato, buffalo mozzarella and fresh basil.
about.point3Text: Neapolitan pizzaioli and dough left to rise for 48 hours.
about.imageAlt: Pizzaiolo putting pizza into the wood-fired oven

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From choice to delivery in 3 steps
howItWorks.step1Text: Build your pizza from the menu and add it to the cart.
howItWorks.step2Text: Our pizzaioli bake your order to order.
howItWorks.step3Text: Get your hot pizza at home in about 30 minutes.
howItWorks.deliveryInfo: We deliver across the city · Mon–Sun 11:00–23:00

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.review1Text: The best margherita in town. Light dough and always punctual delivery.
testimonials.review2Text: I order every Friday. It arrives hot, fragrant and the site is super fast.
testimonials.review3Text: Quality ingredients you can taste. For me the best pizza delivery.

footer.tagline: Authentic Neapolitan pizza, delivered hot to your home.
